mutasi.title: Student Transfers
mutasi.guideDescription: This page records student transfers — incoming from other schools or outgoing to other schools. Each transfer automatically saves the name of the staff member who entered it.
mutasi.tip1: Incoming transfer: a new student moving from another school to this school.
mutasi.tip2: Outgoing transfer: a student moving from this school to another school.
mutasi.tip3: Use the Origin/Destination filter to find transfers from a specific school.
mutasi.tip4: Click a student's name to view their profile and class details.
mutasi.recordCount: {n, plural, one {# transfer record} other {# transfer records}}
mutasi.siswaPlaceholder: Type the name of the transferring student…
